memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Achievement

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Achievement

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Language, EAccelByteAchievementListSortBy const &SortBy, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedPublicAchievement > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20, FString const &TagQuery=TEXT(""), bool bGlobal=false)
memberdef.name: QueryAchievements

briefdescription.para: Query all achievements in the related namespace.

parameterdescription.para: The language to display the appropriate achievement's name and description. If it is empty, it will use its default language. If the achievement does not have the expected language, it will use its default language.
Sorting method for the achievements result.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedPublicAchievement&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the achievements result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the achievements result. Default value is 20.
A query expression consists of tags to query the achievement from.
True if the configuration to display global achievements.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AchievementCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMultiLanguageAchievement > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetAchievement

parameterdescription.para: The code of the expected achievement.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsMultiLanguageAchievement&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteAchievementListSortBy const &SortBy, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserAchievement > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20, bool PreferUnlocked=true, FString const &TagQuery=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: QueryUserAchievements

briefdescription.para: [Deprecated] Query user's achievements. Include achieved and in-progress.

parameterdescription.para: Sorting method for the achievements result. Only support achieveAt, createdAt
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserAchievement&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the achievements result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the achievements result. Default value is 20.

True if the configuration to display unlocked achievements first active, the list order should display unlocked achievements first on top of locked achievements, and false otherwise. Default value is true.
A query expression consists of tags to query the achievement from

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteGlobalAchievementListSortBy const &SortBy, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserAchievement > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20, bool PreferUnlocked=true, FString const &TagQuery=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: QueryUserAchievements

briefdescription.para: Query user's achievements. Include achieved and in-progress.

parameterdescription.para: Sorting method for the achievements result.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserAchievement&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the achievements result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the achievements result. Default value is 20.

True if the configuration to display unlocked achievements first active, the list order should display unlocked achievements first on top of locked achievements, and false otherwise. Default value is true.
A query expression consists of tags to query the achievement from.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, EAccelByteAchievementListSortBy const &SortBy, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserAchievement > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20, bool PreferUnlocked=true, FString const &TagQuery=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: QueryUserAchievementsByUserId

briefdescription.para: Query other user's achievements. Include achieved and in-progress.

parameterdescription.para: Target user id to retrieve achievement data from
Sorting method for the achievements result.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserAchievement&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the achievements result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the achievements result. Default value is 20.

True if the configuration to display unlocked achievements first active, the list order should display unlocked achievements first on top of locked achievements, and false otherwise. Default value is true.
A query expression consists of tags to query the achievement from.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AchievementCode, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnlockAchievement

parameterdescription.para: The achievement code which will be unlock.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsAchievementBulkUnlockRequest const &AchievementsToUnlock, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsAchievementBulkUnlockRespone > > const &UnlockResponses, FErrorHandler const &OnGeneralError)
memberdef.name: BulkUnlockAchievement

parameterdescription.para: Request of achievement that needs to be unlocked.
This will be called when the operation completed. In a form of array for each achievement that was requested.
This will be called when the entire operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AchievementCode, EAccelByteGlobalAchievementStatus const &AchievementStatus, EAccelByteGlobalAchievementListSortBy const &SortBy, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserGlobalAchievement > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20, FString const &TagQuery=TEXT(""))
memberdef.name: QueryGlobalAchievements

briefdescription.para: Get the progress list of global achievements. Include achieved and in-progress.

parameterdescription.para: The achievement code.
The status to display the appropriate achievements.
Sorting method for the global achievements result.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedUserGlobalAchievement&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the achievements result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the achievements result. Default value is 20.
A query expression consists of tags to query the achievement from.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AchievementCode, EAccelByteGlobalAchievementContributorsSortBy const &SortBy, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedGlobalAchievementContributors > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20)
memberdef.name: QueryGlobalAchievementContributors

briefdescription.para: Get the list of contributors for a global achievement.

parameterdescription.para: The achievement code.
Sorting method for the global achievements contributors result.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedGlobalAchievementContributors&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the achievements result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the achievements result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AchievementCode, EAccelByteGlobalAchievementContributorsSortBy const &SortBy, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPaginatedGlobalAchievementUserContributed > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 const &Offset=0, int32 const &Limit=20)
memberdef.name: QueryGlobalAchievementUserContributed

briefdescription.para: Get the list of global achievements that have been contributed by the user.

parameterdescription.para: The achievement code.
Sorting method for the global achievements contributors result.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPaginatedGlobalAchievementUserContributed&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the achievements result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the achievements result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AchievementCode, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ClaimGlobalAchievements

parameterdescription.para: The global achievement code which will be claimed.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: GetTags

parameterdescription.para: The name of the public tag.
Sorting method for the public tag result.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.
The offset of the achievements result. Default value is 0.
The limit of the achievements result. Default value is 20.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.
